title: Board of commissioners created
doc_html:
§2903.  Board of commissioners created

The Board of Commissioners of the Jackson Parish Watershed District, within its powers and duties as defined herein, is hereby created and established as the governing board of the Jackson Parish Watershed District.  

Added by Acts 1968, No. 589, §1.
doc_text:
§2903.  Board of commissioners created
The Board of Commissioners of the Jackson Parish Watershed District, within its powers and duties as defined herein, is hereby created and established as the governing board of the Jackson Parish Watershed District.
Added by Acts 1968, No. 589, §1.
